info.name: OMSHREEGUIDANCE Webhook Tests
info.description: Test collection for OMSHREEGUIDANCE Shopify webhook endpoints

request.description: Test the health check endpoint. This should always return success.

Simple test to check if endpoint exists.

Expected responses:
- 404: Endpoint not deployed yet
- 400/401: Endpoint exists but missing required data (GOOD!)
- 200: Success

Test with minimal order data (no signature verification).

Note: This will fail signature verification if SHOPIFY_WEBHOOK_SECRET is set, but it will confirm the endpoint exists and processes requests.

request.description:
Test with complete order data matching Shopify's order structure.

This simulates a real Shopify webhook payload. Without proper HMAC signature, it will fail verification if SHOPIFY_WEBHOOK_SECRET is configured.

Test with your own email address to receive the confirmation email.

⚠️ IMPORTANT: Replace YOUR_EMAIL@example.com with your actual email address before sending!

If the webhook is working and SHOPIFY_WEBHOOK_SECRET is not set (or signature verification is disabled), you should receive an order confirmation email with the "Schedule Now" button.
